title: they notice a plastic bag with paperwork protruding from Anthony’s pocket. They
content: they notice a plastic bag with paperwork protruding from Anthony’s pocket. They ask a question for which the answer is known. Yeah, I was just released, Anthony replies. After paying, Anthony plops down on the curb outside the gas station’s mini-market and awaits the ride share. In his head, he calculates what drugs he can do with the timeframe presented before him. The drugs that have his name on it: those should be okay, he figured. The drugs that don’t: there must be a system for that, he’d figure. At his grandfather’s house, the house he temporarily calls homes, he give his grandfather the information needed. What were you doing out so late? He couldn’t say he was looking for dick. He could, but he couldn’t, not to a ninety year old man whose wife just died a few weeks earlier. In his bedroom, Anthony takes enough benzos to even himself out. On the dark web, he puts in an order for Afghan heroin. What arrives a few days later is not the crumble and crunchy rock associated with insuflflateable narcotic, but a dark, sticky dope that seemed impossible to sniff, snaff, or snoof. Anthony knew there were four different forms heroin could take, and believed this was black tar requiri
context: From document: Amelia Be. combs her hand along her neck searching for stray hairs… — chunk 3 (chunk 3/4)
